name: Alert
description: Displays a brief, important message that attracts the user's attention without interrupting the user's task. Dynamically rendered alerts are automatically announced by screen readers.

roles.description: Identifies the element as an alert. Implicitly sets aria-live=assertive and aria-atomic=true

notes: Alert is not interactive — no keyboard interaction needed
The alert element must be present in the DOM before injecting the message for screen readers to announce it
Use for time-sensitive, important messages; for less urgent info use role=status with aria-live=polite
